headline: Diesel prices surge to $5 per gallon, highest since 2022, as Iran war disrupts global oil supplies
summary: Fuel prices are likely to keep rising until crude oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz return to normal.

raw.headline: Diesel prices surge to $5 per gallon, highest since 2022, as Iran war disrupts global oil supplies

headline: 2026 Just Capital rankings: How corporate America is investing in post-ESG era
summary: The 2026 Just Capital rankings are topped by Hewlett Packard, followed by Union Pacific, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Dow and S&P Global.
